indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: The absence of a flat surface at sitting height makes it difficult to set up a computer workstation.

indicators.name: no ergonomic seating
indicators.rationale: There is no ergonomic seating available for prolonged computer use.

indicators.name: no dedicated workspace layout
indicators.rationale: The layout does not support a dedicated workspace for focused solo work.

indicators.name: no task lighting
indicators.rationale: There is no task lighting to reduce eye strain and provide good visibility for screen work.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). The lack of a flat personal work surface, ergonomic seating, and dedicated workspace layout make it challenging to set up a productive workstation. Additionally, there is no task lighting to support extended screen use.
